---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Time Series Fourier Features"
image: social-cards/time-series-fourier.png
---

# 🏗️ Fourier Features {#sec-time-series-fourier}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Fourier Features
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
